Disclaimer

Last Updated: July 5, 2026

Important

EV Home Energy Guide is not a company and does not provide professional, legal, electrical, or financial advice. All content is general information for educational purposes only. We cannot answer personal questions or give individual recommendations — always consult a licensed professional before making decisions.

1. General Information Only

The content provided on EV Home Energy Guide is for general educational and informational purposes only. It is not intended to be, and should not be construed as, professional financial, legal, electrical, or investment advice.

2. No Professional Relationship

Your use of this website, including interaction with our calculators, simulators, and guides, does not create a professional advisor-client relationship between you and Vintage Allday LLC, its founder (Louis F.), or its contributors. We are not acting as your electrical contractor, financial advisor, attorney, or professional consultant.

3. Use at Your Own Risk

The tools and information provided on this site are for self-learning. Any decisions you make based on this information are your sole responsibility. We strongly recommend that you conduct your own research and consult with a qualified, licensed professional — such as a certified electrician, financial planner, or attorney — before making any significant financial, legal, or home infrastructure commitments.

4. Accuracy and Completeness

While we strive to ensure that the information on EV Home Energy Guide is accurate and up to date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of the information, tools, or related graphics contained on the website. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk.

5. Software & Tool Accuracy

Our interactive simulators, calculators, and educational tools are provided for estimation and educational purposes only. While we work diligently to ensure the logic and math behind these tools are accurate, software may occasionally contain bugs, calculation errors, or inaccuracies. These tools do not provide exact projections and should not be used as the sole basis for decisions. Users are encouraged to verify important calculations independently.

6. Third-Party Links

EV Home Energy Guide may contain links to external websites that are not under our control. We have no control over the nature, content, and availability of those sites. The inclusion of any links does not necessarily imply a recommendation or endorse the views expressed within them.

7. Limitation of Liability

In no event will Vintage Allday LLC, its founder, or contributors be liable for any loss or damage, including without limitation, indirect or consequential loss or damage, or any loss or damage whatsoever arising from loss of data or profits arising out of, or in connection with, the use of this website.

Welcome to your command center for all things electric. We help you simplify the complex world of home energy by connecting your EV, solar, and battery storage into one efficient system.
